name: 🚀 AI D2C Launch Kit PRO - Multi-Agent Production Engine

parameters.formDescription: Production-grade launch engine. One form → AI generates 60+ marketing assets, hero images, ad creatives, reel video prompts, persona-specific email variants, competitor intel, multi-language copy, UTM-tagged campaign links, and a complete Google Drive asset folder. Cost ₹0. Sellable at ₹1,50,000–₹5,00,000.

values.placeholder: Full product spec — ingredients, features, dimensions, weight, certifications, country of origin
Demographics, psychographics, income bracket, cities, platforms
Top 5 USPs that differentiate from competitors
e.g. Minimalist, Plum, Dot & Key — comma separated, MIN 3 for competitor intel scrape
e.g. Own website, Amazon, Flipkart, Nykaa, Myntra

values.option: Full pan-India (EN + HI + TA + TE + KN + ML + MR + BN)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'You are a senior D2C market intelligence analyst at Bain & Company specialising in Indian consumer brands. Conduct competitor + market analysis for a new product launch.

PRODUCT: ' + $json.productName + '
CATEGORY: ' + $json.category + '
BRAND: ' + $json.brandName + '
PRICE: ' + $json.price + '
USPs: ' + $json.usps + '
COMPETITORS: ' + $json.competitors + '
TARGET: ' + $json.targetAudience + '
BUDGET: ' + $json.budget + '

Return ONLY this JSON (no markdown):
{
  "market_size_inr_cr": "Estimated India TAM in INR Crores with reasoning",
  "market_growth_cagr": "YoY growth rate in this category",
  "competitor_analysis": [
    {
      "name": "competitor 1",
      "positioning": "how they position themselves",
      "price_range": "INR range",
      "strengths": "top 2 strengths",
      "weaknesses": "top 2 weaknesses we can exploit",
      "hero_keyword": "main SEO keyword they rank for"
    }
  ],
  "market_gaps": ["gap 1 we can exploit", "gap 2", "gap 3"],
  "positioning_statement": "Crisp 25-word positioning statement that differentiates us",
  "recommended_price_strategy": "Penetration / Premium / Value — with reasoning",
  "swot": {
    "strengths": ["top 3 brand strengths"],
    "weaknesses": ["top 3 weaknesses to address"],
    "opportunities": ["top 3 market opportunities"],
    "threats": ["top 3 threats"]
  },
  "differentiation_hooks": ["5 angles competitors are NOT using that we should own"],
  "category_trends_2026": ["3 trends shaping this category right now in India"],
  "recommended_launch_channels": ["ranked list of top 5 channels for our budget"],
  "projected_metrics": {
    "month_1_revenue_estimate_inr": "INR estimate with reasoning",
    "target_cac": "Customer acquisition cost target in INR",
    "target_aov": "Average order value target in INR",
    "target_roas": "Return on ad spend target ratio"
  }
}

Be specific to Indian market. Use real competitor knowledge. Numbers must be defensible. Return ONLY JSON.' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.4, maxOutputTokens: 4096 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'You are a senior brand QA editor. Review this launch kit JSON and return a quality score + improvement notes. JSON to review (first 6000 chars): ' + JSON.stringify($json.kit).substring(0, 6000) + '

Return ONLY this JSON:
{
  "overall_score": 85,
  "brand_voice_consistency": 9,
  "copywriting_quality": 9,
  "hashtag_research_quality": 8,
  "persona_alignment": 9,
  "competitor_differentiation": 8,
  "call_to_action_strength": 9,
  "top_3_strengths":["..."],
  "top_3_improvements":["..."],
  "ready_to_deploy": true,
  "reviewer_notes":"50 word executive summary of kit quality"
}' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.3, maxOutputTokens: 2048 } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Build executive brief for brand owner — board-grade, no operational clutter const d = $('📝 Build Mega Agent Email').first().json; const intel = d.intel || {}; const qa = d.qa || {}; const imgs = d.imageGallery || []; const c = { bg:'#f8fafc', card:'#ffffff', border:'#e2e8f0', primary:'#1e40af', accent:'#0891b2', green:'#059669', orange:'#ea580c', text:'#0f172a', muted:'#64748b' }; const metric = (label, value, color) => '
' + label + '
' + value + '
'; const channels = [ { name:'Product Descriptions', count:'6 versions', clr:c.primary }, { name:'Meta Ads (FB + IG)', count:'7 creatives', clr:c.primary }, { name:'Google Ads', count:'2 search + Pmax', clr:c.accent }, { name:'Email Sequence', count:'9 emails', clr:c.orange }, { name:'Organic Social', count:'7 platforms', clr:c.accent }, { name:'WhatsApp Campaigns', count:'5 templates', clr:c.green }, { name:'Influencer Program', count:'3 tiers', clr:c.orange }, { name:'PR Assets', count:'PR + pitch', clr:c.accent }, { name:'SEO Pack', count:'25 keywords', clr:c.green }, { name:'Conversion Assets', count:'FAQ, trust, upsell', clr:c.orange }, { name:'Multilingual', count:'EN + HI + Hinglish', clr:c.primary }, { name:'AI-Generated Images', count:imgs.filter(i => i.status === 'UPLOADED').length + '/2 assets', clr:c.primary }, { name:'Video Prompts', count:'3 reel scripts', clr:c.accent }, { name:'Content Calendar', count:'30 days', clr:c.green }, { name:'A/B Test Variants', count:'9 variants', clr:c.orange } ]; const chHTML = channels.map(ch => '
' + ch.name + '		' + ch.count + '
').join(''); const html = '
' + // Header '
' + '
CAMPAIGN ' + d.campaignId + ' • EXECUTIVE BRIEF
' + '

Your Launch Engine Is Live

' + '

' + d.productName + ' • ' + d.brandName + '

' + '
' + (qa.ready_to_deploy ? '✅ DEPLOYMENT READY' : '⏳ UNDER REVIEW') + ' • QA SCORE ' + (qa.overall_score || 'N/A') + '/100
' + '
' + '
' + // Greeting '

Dear ' + d.ownerName + ',

' + '

Your complete product launch campaign has been prepared by ' + d.agencyName + ', powered by our multi-agent AI engine. Below is the executive brief.

' + // Projected Metrics dashboard '
' + '
📊 Projected Month-1 Performance
' + '' + metric('Est. Revenue', (intel.projected_metrics?.month_1_revenue_estimate_inr || 'TBD').substring(0,12), c.primary) + metric('Target CAC', (intel.projected_metrics?.target_cac || 'TBD').substring(0,12), c.accent) + metric('Target AOV', (intel.projected_metrics?.target_aov || 'TBD').substring(0,12), c.green) + metric('Target ROAS', (intel.projected_metrics?.target_roas || 'TBD').substring(0,12), c.orange) + '
' + // Positioning '
' + '
🎯 Your Market Positioning
' + '

"' + (intel.positioning_statement || 'TBD') + '"

' + '
' + // Channels '
' + '
📣 15 Marketing Channels Activated
' + '' + chHTML + '
' + // Drive Folder CTA '
' + '
📂 ALL CAMPAIGN ASSETS
' + 'OPEN GOOGLE DRIVE FOLDER' + '
2 AI-generated images • All copy assets • Ready to deploy
' + // Timeline '
' + '
📅 Your Launch Timeline
' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '
Today — Final approval & creative review
Day 1-2 — Ad campaigns go live (Meta + Google)
Day 3 — Pre-launch email teaser deployed
Day 5-7 — Influencer outreach & PR pitch
Week 2 — Full 30-day content calendar activated
Weekly — Performance reports & A/B test results
' + // Agent contact card '
' + '
' + d.agentName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + '
' + '
' + d.agentName + '
' + '
' + d.agencyName + ' • Campaign Lead
' + '
✉️ ' + d.agentEmail + '
' + '
' + '
'; return [{ json: { ...d, ownerEmailHTML: html } }];
